entry.title: Incoming Payment Issue: No transaction type coulde be termined: PMNT RRCT VCOM
entry.content: Getting the error message: No transaction type could be determined: PMNT RRCT VCOM

entry.title: Searching for a Fixed Asset with Known Master Data attributes
entry.content: In the AS03 screen, the default search for a fixed asset is performed by entering the Asset number (also requires the company Code).  By jumping through some hoops, you can figure out how to search by Inventory Number (does not require the Company Code?), but sometimes you need to search for an asset with only knowing other Master Data attributes, such as the Serial Number of the Asset.  How does one perform a search for an asset in AS03 if only the Serial Number is known?  SAPECC 6.07 SPS22

entry.title: SAC Planning for Expenses based on Income ratio for the store
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement for Expenses planning to happen storewise using the microsoft excel add-in.
Based on the total sales value of the store, the value of each expense GL A/c needs to be divided against the total sales value.  

CURRENT

Expected calculation is shown below 
(GL Expense/ Sales of that store)

Note - I do know there is a way to write the formula for each GL A/c and divide it by the Income GL group (in the GL Dimension)
But this would be hardcoding the formula for each GL A/c.

Hence, is there a way for the calculation to take the Storewise amount present in the row & divide it by the storewise sales GL grouping, without having the need to hardcode the value for each Expense GL Account ?

@N1kh1l  any inputs in terms of achieving this requirement ?

So that whatever GL's the user selects in the filters & those are visible in the rows, system can divide that by the Income GL group for the store?

 

Regards,
Gavin.

entry.title: How to make the "user-responsible" field mandatory in Cost Center Master Data.
entry.content:
Create a Validation rule for Cost center master data.
requirement is to make "User responsible" field mandatory. user can't save the cost center and change the cost center if "User responsible" is blank.

I have created the validation rule in GGB0. 

Prerequisite: SYST-TCODE = 'KS01' AND CSKSV-KOKRS = 'GCON'
Check: CSKSV-VERAK_USER <> ''
Message: Error message; the User responsible field can't be blank.

But its not working.

I have activated the Validation in OKC7 and GGB4.

Please guide me how to make user-responsible field mandatory in Cost center Master data.

entry.title: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
This is a what if question. I think it's totally insane to do. But I don't make those decisions.

If you think about doing a mass change to your material master and I mean all of your materials.   

How long do you think it will take?

Can it be done?

Will the history be kept?

The background:
We have a limited amount of materials 8,371 - material plant combinations.  We are trying to inactivate/delete what we don't use.  That's a project going on now.  We were mid-flight on an upgrade / that is on-hold now.  The upgrade would move us to 2022 I believe.

We are using all of OTC, all of BTC, all of PTP but we do not have the WM level only the IM.

We use process orders only - no production orders.   Yes, weird.

We have a custom programs, enhancement points, BAPI, BADI, Gateway, CDS, FIORI....  You get the picture.   Around 9000.  I can do the scope for these.   It would take me quite a bit of time.

We have been on SAP since late 1990s.    4.6C to HANA 1709.   All on-premise except for our analytics.   We have several third party products and APIs to all of them.   I would have to call them each individually.

Our consultants are saying it would be done by  the end of the year.   I am saying reimplementation and then I don't even know if it could be done because of the history.  (That's a gut feel and it would take at least an year in my opinion )

Has anyone successfully done this?   Time-line?  Yes we have all kind of transactions against these materials going on - all of the time.

Any information would be helpful.   It's hard for me to get over my mental block of don't do it.

Thank you!

Michelle

Oh yeah - no idea what area to put this one in.   It covers all of them.

entry.title: SAP BY Design - UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a question about the UK BACS Domestic Payment Format.

This is a standard format available in SAP Business By Design. However, our bank has requested some modifications to the file structure to comply with their bank-specific software. I would like to know if this is possible to make such adjustments and if so, how do we import them in the system?

Thank you. 

Best regards.

 Valerie

entry.title: BAPI para documentos da FAGLFLEXA
entry.content:
Boa noite,

Tenho um desenvolvimento que precisa ler as partidas da FAGLFLEXA. Qual BAPI posso utilizar?

Obrigada.

entry.title: Segmentation at company code level
entry.content:
Our Client has its segmentation reporting at company code level, which is basically they distinguish ICE and EV vehicles at company code level. So when the business change the segment from ICE to EV which eventually change the company code and when we have a company code change a new plant to be created in S/4 since M/L is activated for only plant and its associated company code 

Physically plant location is same and however in S/4 due to this new plant creation all the impacted teams will have to do lot of cutover activities 

There are new app from SAP but this is at profit center (Profit Center Reorganization | SAP Help Portal ) and not at Sub-ledger and Inventory will be in same Old company code and its plant, is there any process or app that will .

1. perform this reorganization at the plant level and company code so that i have both sub-ledger and inventory balances account reporting correctly to new EV company code along with profit center 

2. We have restriction today once M/L is set productive this cannot be changed and this forces us to create a new plant , is there any new solutions that SAP provided to lift the plant A from company code 1 to company code 2

entry.title: Incorrect System Number in SMP
entry.content: Incorrect System Number in SMP, need to correct SAP System number

entry.title: [Imposto retido na fonte na categoria Pagamento] Como conciliar lançamentos nesse caso?
entry.content:
Atualmente usamos o regime de caixa como método contábil e por esse motivo, na configuração do imposto retido da fonte selecionamos a categoria pagamento. 

Porém na tentativa de reconciliações, seja pra fins de pagamento ou "limpeza" de parceiro de negócios ou conta contábil, ele da um erro o que não me permite limpar a conta (Usar o mesmo código de imposto retido na fonte da categoria de pagamento para todas as transações durante a reconciliação [Mensagem 3821-32]). Isso tem acumulado muita coisa nas contas, o que dificulta a análise contábil. Abaixo segue o caso:

Estou a um tempo buscando uma solução pra isso, mas infelizmente até agora não encontrei nada. As pessoas só dão como solução trocar a categoria do imposto retido na fonte para a Nota Fiscal.

entry.title: In FBCJ only 1 partcular profit center to be accepted for 1 cash journal.
entry.content:
Dear esteemed members,

There is a requirement that when transactions are posted using FBCJ for a particular cash journal, it should allow only a particular profit center. If any other profit center is selected, the system should throw an error.

For eg.: Cash journal HG01 should only accept Profit Center 1000. Currently, the user can enter any profit center from the list. If any other profit center is selected (apart from 1000) the system should throw an error. How to achieve this? Kindly guide. Thanks in advance. Appreciate all the help!

entry.title: Single dunning letter for multiple company codes at same dunning level
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement is to print all open items on single dunning notice from multiple company codes which has same level of dunning level.

Given i have maintained all the required cross-company code configuration, still system is printing separate dunning letters for each company code at same dunning level. If anyone can suggest, will be great help. 

Thank you.

entry.title: calculate GL cumulative balance in GR55 report
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please suggest the formula to calculate cumulative GL balance available in FAGLB03 in custom built GR55 report.

Thanks

entry.title: Unplanned depreciation for special depreciation
entry.content:
We are having a business scenario where we use special depreciation and ordinary depreciation in one depreciation key. Special depreciation is used to post initial allowance and ordinary depreciation is used to post annual depreciation.

To do adjustment to ordinary depreciation we use unplanned depreciation.

Is there a way where we can post adjustment to system calculated special depreciation  something like an unplanned special depreciation??

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Difference between custom report and fbl3n data results
entry.content:
left (ALV custom report result) right (fbl3n tcode result)

when matched there are hkont (GL/Account) & belnr (DcoumentNo) fields that do not appear in the ALV custom report, even though the query has pulled the others, what do you think is the reason? here is my code :

FORM fetch_data.

  " show data based on PERIOD or POSTING DATE
  IF p_period = 'X'. "Jika p_period is true

    SELECT bukrs belnr gjahr budat monat waers hwaer blart bldat
     INTO TABLE i_bkpf
     FROM bkpf AS a
     WHERE a~gjahr = s_fiscyr " fiscal year
         AND bukrs = '1000' " company code
         AND monat IN s_perio. " period

  ELSE. " Posting Date

    SELECT bukrs belnr gjahr budat monat waers hwaer blart bldat
      INTO TABLE i_bkpf
      FROM bkpf AS a
      WHERE a~gjahr = s_fiscyr " fiscal year
          AND bukrs = '1000' " company code
          AND budat BETWEEN s_date-low AND s_date-high. " Posting date
  ENDIF.

  IF i_bkpf IS NOT INITIAL.

          " GET DATA FROM BSEG TABLE
      SELECT hkont bukrs belnr gjahr bschl lifnr ebeln wrbtr prctr aufnr
      INTO TABLE i_bseg
      FROM bseg
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN i_bkpf
        WHERE gjahr = i_bkpf-gjahr
          AND bukrs = i_bkpf-bukrs
          AND belnr = i_bkpf-belnr " Document Number
          AND hkont IN s_hkont.

    " GET VENDOR DATA
    IF i_bseg IS NOT INITIAL.

      SELECT lifnr name1 stras ort01 pstlz
      INTO TABLE i_lfnr
      FROM lfa1
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN i_bseg
        WHERE lifnr = i_bseg-lifnr.
    ENDIF.

    IF i_bseg IS NOT INITIAL.

      SELECT e~ebeln e~bedat e~lifnr f~matnr f~menge f~netpr
        INTO TABLE i_ekkp
         FROM ekko AS e
         LEFT JOIN ekpo AS f
         ON e~ebeln = f~ebeln " Purchasing Document
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN i_bseg
        WHERE lifnr = i_bseg-lifnr
        AND e~ebeln = i_bseg-ebeln.

    ENDIF.

    IF i_bseg IS NOT INITIAL.

      LOOP AT i_bkpf INTO ls_bkpf.
        LOOP AT i_bseg INTO ls_bseg WHERE bukrs = ls_bkpf-bukrs AND gjahr = ls_bkpf-gjahr AND belnr = ls_bkpf-belnr.
          CLEAR ls_result.

          IF ls_bseg-wrbtr IS NOT INITIAL.

            ls_bseg-wrbtr = ls_bseg-wrbtr * 100.

          ENDIF.

          IF ls_bseg-lifnr IS NOT INITIAL.
            READ TABLE i_lfnr INTO ls_lfnr WITH KEY lifnr = ls_bseg-lifnr BINARY SEARCH.
            MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_lfnr TO ls_result.
          ENDIF.

          IF ls_bseg-ebeln IS NOT INITIAL.
            READ TABLE i_ekkp INTO ls_ekkp WITH KEY ebeln = ls_bseg-ebeln BINARY SEARCH.
            MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_ekkp TO ls_result.
          ENDIF.

          IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
            MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_bkpf TO ls_result.
            MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_bseg TO ls_result.
            APPEND ls_result TO lt_result.
          ENDIF.

        ENDLOOP.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

    IF p_sum_gl = 'X'.
      PERFORM display_sum_gl.
    ENDIF.

    IF p_sum_vn = 'X'.
      PERFORM display_sum_vn.
    ENDIF.

  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.                    "fetch_data

entry.title: How to process Trade-ins in procurement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
In previous systems that I've used including JD Edwards One World, Microsoft Dynamics Navision, and even bookkeeping software like Xero and QuickBooks, we always had the ability to enter in negative dollar amounts on to purchase orders and sales orders on a line item basis.   The total amount for the purchase order or the sales order would be a positive number, however individual lines could be negative. This could be used for a variety of reasons depending upon whether it was a sales or a purchase order, but a few of the things that we used it for would be for advanced payments, special discounts received, core charges, trade-in credits, etc. usually this came up in an instance in which the item that you were receiving or selling differed from when you would receive the discounts or the other credits back from the vendor or a payment had to be made, or in the case in which the credit needed to go to a different GL account than the base item that you were purchasing.  

In this instance that we're talking about, we are buying a specific fixed asset, and having a trade-in value for another fixed asset that we are turning in to that vendor. We then have post payment dates for when we actually need to pay on the invoice, and the payments are a mix of the truck we’re purchasing and the trade in credit. So in this instance because it's an asset the accounting rule states that when we receive the item we have to go ahead and recognize the full value of what that item is worth as a fixed asset and start depreciating it. Even though we are not paying for it until almost a year later. So in this instance we created a line for receiving of that fixed asset for the full value of it, and then because we have a trade-in credit, right below that added in a line for the negative value of that trade in. Because it is a trade-in credit from a different fixed asset it needs to be coded to a different GL account for that trade-in credit then where the original fixed asset is going to go. So the net amount of the purchase order is 1.2 million however the value of the truck that we're getting is 1.4 million, and we're getting a trading credit of 200,000 that needs to go to two separate GL accounts. Then even though we have gotten the use of the truck the payments are not going to happen until significantly later and they are two different payments that are going to happen. So in this instance we're going to be making one payment for half in January of 2025, and then the next won't happen until the end of 2025. So in that instance we post the total value to an outstanding liability account, basically the reverse of a prepaid account, and then use the purchase order to receive those lines whenever the invoices come in for the payments at the specified time.

We tried doing this through negative dollar values and negative quantities on the order but neither one of those ways would work within SAP, both instances gave an error on the purchase order. So what we're looking for is a way to enter a negative line on a purchase order while the total purchase order is still a positive value.

It is generally significantly easier to do this in a single document that is managed by both the purchaser and the purchasing team than it is to split this up through multiple documents. I know we could probably do this through journal entries, or we could do this through multiple different documents whether that be orders and return orders, or debit and credit memos, or these kind of things, but ultimately that is going to be reliant on somebody remembering to put all these in the system at the time that it is needed. It is significantly easier to just manage it within the purchase order because it's all a part of the individual purchase.

Please check the attached document for the process flow of the old system and suggest how we can map this requirement in SAP.
I really appreciate any help you can provide.

entry.title: GR55 report in SAP CO between two different system landscape
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a new requirement two develop the similar report in other SAP system landscape in production system by taking the reference of a GR55 report from other production system.

1. is there any way to copy the same report between two different system landscapes (not within the client both are different system) If yes can you please help me on this or If no then i need to develop the report manually.

2. I am developing the same report using sandbox system using Report painter tool by taking reference of 1SAP and edited the elements and rows fields as per ourrequirements.

After executing the developed sample one in GR55 ---Report group(developed by me as per requirements)

second screen: My client doesn't want this period field

I can hide this this field in selection screen by saving variant but after executing the report it is showing in header section like this below;

How to exclude that 'period' field in the report group in report header can any one please help me. i already rechecked but period field not selected while developing the report in Report Painter tool.

Kindly need experts suggestion on this.

Regards,

Govindu Uday

entry.title: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Incoming Payment against Service Invoice
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm using SAP B1 10.0 FP 2111.

I have a problem in adding the incoming payments based on a service invoice. The payment means selected is Bank Transfer. Please note that there is Export Customer & payment is in Foreign Currency. This happens not only while taking Payment entry based in Service Invoice but also when doing Manual Reconciliation of Service Invoice & On Account Incoming Payment. All details has been added properly, but the system show the error message while adding Incoming Payment as below: 'Field cannot be updated (ODBC-1029)' <<Message 131-183>>

Please recommend a solution and also suggest reasons for occuring such query again & again for Service AR Invoice.

Thanks in advance!!!
.

entry.title: Verification of all the general journal entries
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We've a requirement that all journal entries posted in SAP must be verified and approved by an approver. However, users occasionally post entries using the 'Post General Journal Entries' option or through mass uploads in the 'Upload Journal Entries' app. This practice creates compliance issues, as reviewers must manually search for journals posted without approval.

We explored whether we could adjust the business roles to address this issue. Unfortunately, the business catalog that provides access to the 'Verify Journal Entries' app also includes access to the 'Manage Journal Entries' app.

Is there a way to ensure that all journal entries are properly approved before they are posted irrespective of the application used?

Thank you.

 

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Layout not working
entry.content:
Hi,

Some layouts will give a list but some just don't in SAP ECC. One I tried worked, next time it did not. I tried about a half dozen different layouts, maybe 50% worked. Created a new one, it is working. I am using these layout in T-code: FBL1N. What might be the issue. Do I have to contact SAP finance  consultant or ABAB consultant?

Thank you
